Question: What is the overall average heart pumping volume per minute observed in three distinct patient cases, each subjected to different drug infusion methods for circulatory support and receiving varying intensities of respiratory or extracorporeal life assistance?

Question: What is the average MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex among patients meeting any of the following study-specific criteria: (1) enrolled in MassEyeEar-ICU-Seq-210 with HLA-A02:01 homozygous, sepsis risk stratum "qSOFA 0 — ambulatory physiology, no organ support", and antibiotic exposure "combination anti-pseudomonal beta-lactam and aminoglycoside"; (2) enrolled in Hopkins-SepsisRegistry-716 with HLA-B15:01 homozygous, sepsis risk stratum "coagulopathic sepsis phenotype with INR elevation", and antibiotic exposure "oral tetracycline course completed within 14 days"; or (3) enrolled in NIH-Translational-ICU-1002 with HLA supertyping cluster "A2/B7 predominant", sepsis risk stratum "SOFA stable with escalating oxygen supplementation", and antibiotic exposure "prolonged carbapenem therapy exceeding 72 hours"?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex) AS MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex FROM (SELECT MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex AS MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex FROM CriticalCareMicrobiomeCohort WHERE EnrollmentCipher = "MassEyeEar-ICU-Seq-210" AND HLAAllotypeGroup = "HLA-A*02:01 homozygous" AND SepsisRiskStratum = "qSOFA 0 — ambulatory physiology, no organ support" AND AntibioticExposureDescriptor = "combination anti-pseudomonal beta-lactam and aminoglycoside" UNION ALL SELECT MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex AS MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex FROM CriticalCareMicrobiomeCohort WHERE EnrollmentCipher = "Hopkins-SepsisRegistry-716" AND HLAAllotypeGroup = "HLA-B*15:01 homozygous" AND SepsisRiskStratum = "coagulopathic sepsis phenotype with INR elevation" AND AntibioticExposureDescriptor = "oral tetracycline course completed within 14 days" UNION ALL SELECT MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex AS MicrobiomeDysbiosisIndex FROM CriticalCareMicrobiomeCohort WHERE EnrollmentCipher = "NIH-Translational-ICU-1002" AND HLAAllotypeGroup = "HLA supertyping cluster: A2/B7 predominant" AND SepsisRiskStratum = "SOFA stable with escalating oxygen supplementation" AND AntibioticExposureDescriptor = "prolonged carbapenem therapy exceeding 72 hours");
